name: Cochrane CD013875_pub2 analysis 7: Clinical pregnancy – sensitivity analysis (risk ratio)
citation: Cochrane review CD013875_pub2 (DOI 10.1002/14651858.CD013875.pub2). Binary 2x2 data extracted via Pairwise70/cochrane-data-extractor; reference = metafor rma (REML) from pairwise70 ma4_metafor_validation.csv.
note: Engine REML reproduces the metafor pooled estimate to <5e-6 on this real Cochrane dataset. Re-verify against the source review forest plot before external citation.
